question: Which datasets are used most frequently across all studies?
question_de: Welche Datensätze werden über alle Studien hinweg am häufigsten verwendet?
gold_query: SELECT ?datasetLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?usageCount) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset rdfs:label ?datasetLabel . } GROUP BY ?datasetLabel ORDER BY DESC(?usageCount)

question: What is the distribution of evaluation metrics for each NLP task type?
question_de: Wie verteilen sich die Evaluierungsmetriken auf die verschiedenen NLP-Aufgabentypen?
gold_query: SELECT ?nlpTypeLabel ?metricLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask ; orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?nlpTask orkgp:P181004 ?nlpType . ?eval orkgp:P110006 ?metric . ?nlpType rdfs:label ?nlpTypeLabel . ?metric rdfs:label ?metricLabel . } GROUP BY ?nlpTypeLabel ?metricLabel ORDER BY ?nlpTypeLabel DESC(?count)

question: How many studies provide a publicly accessible tool or code repository?
question_de: Wie viele Studien stellen ein öffentlich zugängliches Tool oder einen Code-Repository zur Verfügung?
gold_query: SELECT ?availability (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181046 ?approach . OPTIONAL { ?approach orkgp:release ?rel . ?rel orkgp:P1003 ?url . } BIND(IF(BOUND(?url), "Publicly Available", "Not Reported/Private") AS ?availability) } GROUP BY ?availability

question: Which papers report a high Inter-coder Reliability (Kappa > 0.8)?
question_de: Welche Paper berichten über eine hohe Inter-Coder-Reliabilität (Kappa > 0,8)?
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?paperLabel ?kappaValue WHERE { ?paper rdfs:label ?paperLabel ; orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181031 ?proc . ?proc orkgp:P181041 ?reliability . ?reliability orkgp:P181045 ?kappaValue . FILTER(xsd:float(?kappaValue) > 0.8) }

question: What are the most common input data formats (e.g., User Stories, App Reviews) for RE tasks?
question_de: Was sind die häufigsten Eingangsdatenformate (z. B. User Stories, App-Reviews) für RE-Aufgaben?
gold_query: SELECT ?inputLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181003 ?nlpTask . ?nlpTask orkgp:P181005 ?input . ?input rdfs:label ?inputLabel . } GROUP BY ?inputLabel ORDER BY DESC(?count)

question: How has the focus on different RE tasks (e.g., Extraction, Classification) changed over the years?
question_de: Wie hat sich der Fokus auf verschiedene RE-Aufgaben (z. B. Extraktion, Klassifizierung) im Laufe der Jahre verändert?
gold_query: SELECT ?year ?reTaskLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P29 ?year ; orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181002 ?reTask . ?reTask rdfs:label ?reTaskLabel . } GROUP BY ?year ?reTaskLabel ORDER BY DESC(?year) DESC(?count)

question: Which programming languages or dependencies are most frequently used to implement the approaches?
question_de: Welche Programmiersprachen oder Abhängigkeiten werden am häufigsten zur Implementierung der Ansätze verwendet?
gold_query: SELECT ?depLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181046 ?approach . ?approach orkgp:P181048 ?dep . ?dep rdfs:label ?depLabel . } GROUP BY ?depLabel ORDER BY DESC(?count)

question: What is the relationship between the dataset source (Industrial vs Academic) and the reported dataset size?
question_de: Wie ist das Verhältnis zwischen der Datensatzquelle (Industrie vs. Akademie) und der angegebenen Datensatzgröße?
gold_query: SELECT ?sourceTypeLabel (AVG(xsd:integer(?size)) AS ?avgSize) WHERE { ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181011 ?dataset . ?dataset orkgp:P181015 ?size ; orkgp:P181017 ?source . ?source orkgp:P181018 ?sourceType . ?sourceType rdfs:label ?sourceTypeLabel . } GROUP BY ?sourceTypeLabel

question: Which studies use students as annotators versus professional practitioners?
question_de: Welche Studien nutzen Studenten als Annotatoren im Vergleich zu professionellen Praktikern?
gold_query: SELECT ?identityLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:P181031 ?proc . ?proc orkgp:P181032 ?ann . ?ann orkgp:P181035 ?identity . ?identity rdfs:label ?identityLabel . } GROUP BY ?identityLabel ORDER BY DESC(?count)

question: What are the most used baseline algorithms for comparison in recent papers?
question_de: Was sind die am häufigsten verwendeten Baseline-Algorithmen zum Vergleich in aktuellen Papern?
gold_query: SELECT ?baselineLabel (COUNT(?paper) AS ?count) WHERE { ?paper orkgp:P31 ?contribution . ?contribution rdf:type orkgc:C121001 ; orkgp:HAS_EVALUATION ?eval . ?eval orkgp:P181051 ?baseline . ?baseline rdfs:label ?baselineLabel . } GROUP BY ?baselineLabel ORDER BY DESC(?count)
